# Fixture canon: index (synthetic)

The edge-map for the Model & Retrieval Substrate fixture corpus. Synthetic test data, no
live content. The indexer skips `_index.md` (infrastructure, not a knowledge node).

| title | description | path | domain | tags | links |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Tea | a hot beverage | topics/tea.md | beverage | beverage, hot-drink | [[Coffee]] |
| Coffee | a hot beverage | topics/coffee.md | beverage | beverage, hot-drink | [[Tea]] |
| Bicycle | a two-wheeled vehicle | topics/bicycle.md | transport | transport | |
